meaning: vi.变小,亏缺,衰落,退潮,消逝,呈下弦n.月亏,月亏期,衰退,衰退期
examples: Her popularity has been on the wane for some time.
While his interest in these sports began to wane, a passion for lacrosse developed.
Without demonstrable progress, the negotiators will begin to see their influence wane.
While almost every country now votes, public faith in democracy is on the wane.
But now there are fears that this aspect of Singapore's culinary heritage is on the wane.
